---
title: "STAT201Final"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-14"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)
library(lubridate)
install.packages("writexl")
library(writexl)
```


Adds Files
```{r}
library(readxl)
Snowfall <- read_csv("Snowfall.csv")
BirchBrookDischarge <- read_excel("BirchBrookDischarge.xlsx")
BirchBrookTemp <- read_excel("BirchBrookTemp.xlsx")
Precipitation <- read_excel("Precipitation.xlsx")
```

Calculates the average monthly temperature and discharge of Birch Brook
```{r}
BirchBrookDischarge <- BirchBrookDischarge %>% mutate(Date = as.Date(Date)) %>% filter(month(Date) >= 5 & month(Date) <= 10)

monthDis <- BirchBrookDischarge %>% mutate(Month = floor_date(Date, "month")) %>% group_by(Month) %>% summarize(`Main Branch Birch Brook daily AVG discharge ft3s-1` = mean(`Main Branch Birch Brook daily AVG discharge ft3s-1`, na.rm = TRUE))

monthTemp <- BirchBrookTemp %>% mutate(Month = floor_date(`Main Branch Birch Brook Temperature Record`, "month")) %>% group_by(Month) %>% summarize(`Avg Temp Birch Brook (ºC)` = mean(`Avg Temp Birch Brook (ºC)`, na.rm = TRUE))
```

Exports the data to spreadsheets to be combined in larger dataset
```{r}
write_xlsx(monthDis, "monthDis.xlsx")
write_xlsx(monthTemp, "monthTemp.xlsx")
```
